home.heroTagline: Economic Insight, Local Expertise, Trust-Based Advisory
home.heroSubtitle: 22 years of banking and economics experience, 8 years of on-the-ground knowledge of North Cyprus. One-on-one investment and financial advisory tailored to your goals and risk profile.

heroStats.label: Years On the Ground in North Cyprus

home.founderTitle: A Name from Inside the Economy: Gülay Yıldız
home.founderParagraph1: More than 22 years of experience in private banking, commercial banking and branch management at Garanti BBVA, ING Bank and Türk Ekonomi Bankası. For the last 8 years of her career, she managed the TRNC economy, banking system and market dynamics first-hand as a branch manager in North Cyprus.
home.founderParagraph2: With the dual perspective of Turkish and TRNC citizenship, she reads both economies simultaneously and offers investors trust-based, one-on-one advisory — never a sales pitch.
founderHighlights: 22+ years of banking and economics experience
Private banking, commercial banking and branch leadership
8 years as a branch manager in North Cyprus
Dual Turkish and TRNC citizenship — a dual economic perspective
home.founderImageAlt: Gülay Yıldız — Founder of Primevest Investment
home.servicesSubtitle: From protecting your savings to long-term investment strategy — holistic financial advisory at your side every step of the way.
home.whySubtitle: If you are looking for analysis instead of marketing, strategy instead of products, and trust instead of sales — you are in the right place.

whyItems.title: Banking-Grade Expertise
whyItems.description: 22 years of institutional banking discipline: risk analysis, credit assessment and investment financing knowledge underpin our advisory.

whyItems.title: Local Command of Cyprus
whyItems.description: Our knowledge of the TRNC economy, banking system and regulations comes from 8 years in the field — not from behind a desk.

whyItems.title: One-on-One Advisory
whyItems.description: No standard packages. A bespoke strategy built around your goals, risk profile and income structure.

whyItems.title: Independent and Transparent
whyItems.description: We don't sell products or chase commissions. Our only agenda is the investor's interest; our model is trust-based advisory.

whyItems.title: A Holistic Financial View
whyItems.description: Savings, investments, currency balance and retirement under one roof — we plan the whole, not the parts.

whyItems.title: Long-Term Value
whyItems.description: No short-term profit promises; well-structured, sustainable strategies built to endure.

home.ctaTitle: Let's Draw Your Financial Road Map Together
home.ctaText: Wondering how to put your savings to work? Get in touch now for personalised advisory. Your first consultation is free.
home.ctaFormSubtitle: Leave your details and our expert team will call you.

services.title: Investment & Financial Advisory Services
services.subtitle: A trust-based — never sales-driven — model, at your side at every stage of your savings journey.

items.title: Personal Investment Advisory
items.description: An investment strategy tailored to your goals and risk profile. Together we structure which instruments, maturities and currencies your savings should work in.

items.title: Financial Planning & Savings Strategy
items.description: From the emergency fund to long-term goals — we bring your income, spending and savings together under a single plan.

items.title: Portfolio Analysis & Diversification
items.description: An independent assessment of your existing assets: concentration risks, currency balance and maturity structure are analysed and a balanced allocation proposed.
features: An X-ray of your current portfolio

items.title: Financial Guidance in North Cyprus
items.description: Local expertise on banking, deposits and how finance works in the TRNC. End-to-end guidance for newcomers to the island and those living between the two countries.

items.title: Retirement & Long-Term Savings
items.description: Disciplined, sustainable retirement planning that puts the power of compounding to work over time. We structure tomorrow, starting today.

items.title: Independent Second Opinion
items.description: We evaluate an investment proposal you have received — or your current strategy — with an impartial eye. The decision is yours; the analysis is ours.

services.processSubtitle: A four-step advisory process — transparent and built on trust.

processSteps.title: Introduction & Goal Analysis
processSteps.description: In a free first meeting, we listen to you, your goals and your expectations.

processSteps.title: Financial Situation & Risk Profile
processSteps.description: Your income and spending balance, assets and true risk tolerance are analysed together.

processSteps.title: A Bespoke Strategy
processSteps.description: An asset allocation, maturity structure and currency balance matched to your goals.

processSteps.title: Regular Review & Revision
processSteps.description: A plan is a living document; as markets and your life change, we update it together.

services.ctaText: Not sure which service fits you? Let's clarify it together in an introductory meeting.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Trust-based advisory that combines economic insight with local expertise in North Cyprus.
about.storyParagraph1: Primevest Investment was founded by Gülay Yıldız, who combines more than 22 years of banking and economics experience with personal investment advisory. She built a strong institutional foundation in private banking, commercial banking and branch management at leading banks such as Garanti BBVA, ING Bank and Türk Ekonomi Bankası — reinforced by the operational and strategic experience of managing a branch in North Cyprus for the last 8 years of her career.
about.storyParagraph2: With first-hand command of the TRNC economy, its banking system and market dynamics, a strong local network and the multifaceted perspective of dual citizenship, Primevest does not hand investors ready-made products — it develops well-structured, sustainable financial strategies matched to their goals and risk profiles.
about.storyMotto: Our approach is clear: the right analysis, the right strategy, the right timing.
about.storyParagraph3: At Primevest, our goal is not to match an investor with a product, but to guide them towards strategic decisions that protect and grow their capital. For us, every investor marks not a transaction but the beginning of a long-term relationship built on trust.
about.storyImageAlt: Gülay Yıldız — from her Güçlü Kadınlar magazine interview

values.title: Trust
values.description: We build transparent relationships with our clients, founded on trust. Honest, open communication at every step.

values.title: Strategy
values.description: We turn 22 years of banking and economics experience into bespoke investment strategies.

values.title: Vision
values.description: We look to the future with an innovative approach that brings technology into the world of finance.

values.title: Personal Attention
values.description: We stand by every investor with a personalised, one-on-one advisory model.
